---
title: "Venue"
toc: false
---

The 2nd Peritoneal Summit takes place in **Spiez**, a small town on Lake Thun in the Bernese Oberland, Switzerland.

## Getting there

- **By train:** Spiez is on the Bern–Interlaken line. Direct trains from Zürich Airport take about 2 hours; Bern is 25 minutes away.
- **By car:** Spiez is on the A8 motorway, well-signposted from Bern.
- **From the airport:** Zürich (~2 h) and Geneva (~2.5 h) are both straightforward by train.

## Accommodation

Conference accommodation will be available at the venue itself and at nearby hotels. Details and a booking link will appear once registration opens (September 2026).

## About Spiez

Spiez sits on the southern shore of Lake Thun, with views of the surrounding alps and a medieval castle on the lakefront. The town is compact, walkable, and connected by the Bernese Oberland railways to nearby hiking and excursions (Niesen, Stockhorn, Interlaken).

<!-- TODO: add venue photo, map, hotel block info -->
